episodes.title: Epstein Truth Commission to hold meeting Monday
episodes.description:
New Mexico’s Epstein Truth Commission will hold its first public meeting on Monday as members begin reviewing possible law changes tied to justice for survivors.

Story: https://www.kob.com/new-mexico/santa-fe-northern-new-mexico/epstein-truth-commission-to-hold-meeting-monday/
